Huge day (+89)! **Country school shooting → Canada** (cross-inference, 0.60) **+80.0**! **Trump address tensions → Iran** (0.20) +33.9! The unguessable specifics (Tumbler Ridge, cyclone Geralda) were bounded losses. TW now **1423.70** (day 46, ~halfway).

Aggressive cross-question inference (same-event linkage) is hugely valuable. Next: Bangladesh election (Feb 12, Q304287 Jamaat 0.52), Navalny toxin (Feb 13, Novichok 0.6), T20 WC/Olympics progressing. Advancing.
